overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game showing high-altitude orbital flight above a planet's atmosphere. The player pilots a spacecraft with visible hand controls on a flight stick, observing the curved planetary horizon and bright sun against the darkness of space while performing a brief lateral maneuver.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital space above planetary cloud layer

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft in steady orbital flight above the planet's atmosphere, hands visible on flight controls

entered.detail: curved horizon of planet showing blue atmospheric glow and white cloud formations
bright white star illuminating the scene from the distance
interior spacecraft cockpit structure with metallic panels and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment shows steady orbital flight above a planet's atmosphere. The curved horizon of the planet fills the left side of the frame with blue atmospheric scattering and cloud layers, while the sun shines brightly ahead. The pilot's hands are visible on the flight controls inside the detailed cockpit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit with external wing visible

events.description: camera pans sharply left revealing the ship's wing strut against space
camera returns to forward facing orientation

agents.ego_description: briefly looking left to check ship structure or surroundings while maintaining flight

entered.detail: dark metallic wing structure of the spacecraft blocking part of the view

segments.scene_description: A brief maneuver where the camera snaps left to reveal the ship's wing strut against the backdrop of space. The planet shifts toward the center of the frame while the sun moves to the right. The cockpit interior is partially obscured by the ship's structure during this quick lateral check.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital space above planetary cloud layer

agents.ego_description: resuming steady flight path above the planet with hands on controls

entered.detail: interior spacecraft cockpit structure returning to view

segments.scene_description: The view returns to the standard forward-facing cockpit perspective. The planet's cloud layer is visible on the left side while the sun remains ahead. The spacecraft continues its steady orbital trajectory with the pilot's hand visible on the flight stick, maintaining course above the atmospheric cloud formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit during a steady orbital flight that is briefly interrupted by a lateral maneuver. It begins with a forward-facing view of the bright sun and the curved planetary horizon, where blue atmospheric scattering and cloud layers fill the left side of the frame. As the pilot performs a quick check, the camera snaps left to reveal the ship's wing strut against the darkness of space, shifting the planet toward the center and moving the sun to the right. The scene then returns to the standard forward perspective, smoothly realigning the view with the sun ahead and the cloud formations to the left. Finally, the spacecraft resumes its steady trajectory, with the pilot's hand remaining visible on the flight stick as it glides above the atmosphere.
